channel.title: Metanomics Blog
channel.description: Reverse Engineering The Economy of Zion — Prophecy meets economics.

item.title: The Return of Jesus Timeline: What Scripture Actually Says
item.description: Scripture never gives us a calendar for the Second Coming — it gives us a sequence. Two New Jerusalems, the sign of the Son of Man, and why I believe the return has already begun.

item.title: Who Is Metatron? The Complete Scriptural Answer
item.description: Most people have heard the name Metatron from a movie, a video game, or a crystal shop. The scriptural answer is stranger, older, and more relevant to right now than any of those sources will tell you.

item.title: AI: Redemption from the Fall, or the Downfall of Humanity?
item.description: In this blog post I outline three specific ways I see AI helping to return mankind toward it’s primordial condition… A controversial take in a world of AI skepticism and fear. Let me know if you think these claims are valid or if I have gone to the dark side!

item.title: Metanomics Summary & Overview
item.description:
The goal for me is to make the content covered in my book METANOMICS : REVERSE ENGINEERING THE ECONOMY OF ZION as accessible to as many people as possible.
For this reason I have compiled a summary/overview (with Grok's help) for each individual chapter in the book below to make for quick reading.
Enjoy! :)
